name: M365 Dormant Admin Account Review
summary: Find privileged accounts with little or no recent sign-in activity.
description: Exports an HTML dashboard that highlights dormant privileged accounts based on configurable sign-in thresholds.
outputs: Writes an HTML dormant admin account dashboard to the configured output directory.

fields.label: Tenant ID or Domain
fields.helpText: Optional. If provided, device-code sign-in is scoped to this tenant.

prerequisites: PowerShell 7 and backend Microsoft Graph modules available in the execution container
Microsoft 365 admin sign-in by device code when prompted
Microsoft Graph permissions required by the selected workflow

examples.title: Default tenant-wide run
examples.description: Use the default field values and authenticate when the device-code prompt appears.

examples.title: Scoped admin review
examples.description: Provide a tenant id or domain to scope authentication to the expected Microsoft 365 tenant.
